english: purely from the outside / just from the outside / from the outside alone
notes: A phrase combining 'rein' (purely/just) as an adverb with 'von außen' (from the outside). Used to indicate that something is judged or perceived solely based on external appearance.

sentences.german: Rein von außen sieht das Haus sehr gepflegt aus, aber innen ist es renovierungsbedürftig.
sentences.english: Just from the outside, the house looks very well-kept, but inside it needs renovation.
